message:
fix: enable auto-import for orphans command so it reads fresh issue state

Moves Commands::Orphans from the no-auto-import arm to the auto-import
arm in should_auto_import(). Without this, orphans operated on stale
data when the on-disk markdown had changed since last import. Adds a
dedicated unit test asserting the new behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
